text: - If `--workspace` accompanies an absolute `--channel`, either forbid the combination or require matching roots. I prefer forbidding it. [...] There’s also a real launch bug hiding here: current `launch --workspace workspace2` still forwards workspace1’s cwd and can record it as workspace2’s path. Absolute resolution must select both the fabric root and that workspace’s local directory; if workspace2 has no local binding, fail loudly.
